text: I'm so happy for you. Quitting something that's had its hooks in you for so long is genuinely hard, and the fact that you pushed through all the cravings and the rough days says a lot about how strong you are. I know it wasn't a straight line and there were moments it felt impossible, which makes this even more worth celebrating. Be proud of yourself, because I sure am. If you ever feel the pull to slip back, you know I've got your back. For now, just enjoy this win. You earned it.
